head.hi: The Costa Rican Minister for Foreign Affairs to the Secretary of State.

div.p: It has been decided to install on the 25th of this month the Central American court of justice created by the convention which was signed to that effect in Washington on the 20th of December last, and my Government has the honor to invite Your Excellency’s Government to be pleased to be represented, if agreeable, at the ceremonies of the inauguration of that tribunal.
We shall take great pleasure in receiving the delegate the enlightened American Government may be pleased to accredit for that purpose.
With distinguished consideration I am, Your Excellency’s obedient servant,
